results.title: CHICKEN KARAHI RECIPE RESTAURANT STYLE | CHICKEN KARAHI | SPICE EATS
results.reason: The best match; Karahi and Kadhai are the same dish, and Spice Eats is noted for clear, English-friendly instructions.

Use fresh tomatoes to make a thick sauce

Finish the dish with fresh ginger and herbs

Create a rich sauce without using many tools
